title: saussurea japonica f. alata
intro: Saussurea japonica f. alata, also known as Japanese costus root, is a type of plant belonging to the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of this plant include relief from digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. The herbal preparations of Saussurea japonica f. alata include decoctions, infusions, and powder forms, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including gastrointestinal disorders and infections.
